cases.name: Mixed Workflow 2 - Code Hash Diversity
cases.comment: Benchmarks proof size impact of 200 ERC20 tokens with different code hashes. Each token is a separate contract (V_0..V_199) with a unique variant() return value baked into the bytecode. Per iteration: each token mints to a fresh account which then transfers to 20 random addresses.

inputs.comment: Benchmark: mint and transfer across all 200 ERC20 variants with different code hashes
